data.name: Xeno Girlfriend
data.detailed_description:
10 years ago, when you were sneaking out of the orphanage, you met an alien girl who appears to have crash-landed on earth. Now, 10 years later, the two of you live alone together, and your relationship can only be described as overwhelmingly weird. Females from her planet express their love by making their soulmate their pet and dominating them, and because she's madly in love with you, she dominates you to her heart's content, but you're okay with it because you're a masochist who loves being dominated by her just as much as she loves dominating you.

Experience a day with your lovingly sadistic, big-breasted, alien girlfriend, Xipra.

  • ~1.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 16 Unique character images

  • 20 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
